scroll_found.title: Research the Living Decay scroll at a Research Pedestal

scroll_found_2.title: Research the Infernal Passage scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: The Cataclysm ends here. What remains is what it left behind.

description: Lacrima is the tear from the Nether's oldest thing.
The Netherite Monstrosity did not choose to become what it became.
The Living Decay scroll documents the Biological Civilization:
what happens when life integrates with something that does not stop growing.
The Infernal Passage scroll documents the passage they used.
Both are records of decisions that cannot be undone.
You are past the Cataclysm chain's main sequence.
The Emulator and The Leviathan remain as optional extensions.
The portal does not require them.
